import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut a_str = ""
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        i = n
      else
        a_str = "#{a_str}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
  end
  mut j = string.len(a_str)
  while j < string.len(line)
    match string.byte_at(line, j)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        j = j + 1
      else
        j = string.len(line) + 1
      end
    when None
      j = string.len(line) + 1
    end
  end
  let start_b = j - 1
  mut b_str = ""
  mut k = start_b + 1
  mut done = false
  if start_b >= 0
    k = start_b
  end
  while k < string.len(line) and not done
    match string.byte_at(line, k)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        done = true
      else
        b_str = "#{b_str}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        k = k + 1
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  let a = match string.parse_int(a_str)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let b = match string.parse_int(b_str)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let r = a * a + b * b
  println("r=#{r}")
end
